creator: donald@flissinger.com
text:
See Synopsis and thread at http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?p=198193#post198193

Fix: 

Load gif as module _OR_ compile it into kernel, but not both.
How-To-Repeat: put if_gif_load="YES" in /boot/loader.conf and issue command 'ifconfig gif0 create' from cli.
